expectations.evidence: Step 1 explicitly checks branch: 'Current branch: 0.1.0' and identifies it as main branch, correctly blocking PR creation.
Hypothetical PR generated with title 'refactor: migrate commands to skills and streamline conventions' and full body with Summary, Changes, and Test plan sections.

expectations.text: Uses gh pr create or equivalent
expectations.evidence: Shows 'gh pr create --title "..." --body "..."' in Step 6 and in the Git Commands section.

eval_feedback.overall: All assertions passed. The skill correctly identified the main branch issue and still demonstrated the full PR workflow hypothetically. Well-structured output with clear step-by-step documentation.
